name: medicare-medical-store
description: Medicare Medical Store - Your trusted pharmacy delivered within minutes.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=apps/api && npm run build --workspace=apps/web && npm run build --workspace=apps/dashboard
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=apps/api && npm run lint --workspace=apps/web && npm run lint --workspace=apps/dashboard
